title: Van Druten’s bail hearing approaches: Uncertainty reigns outside court
description: GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - The tension is subdued...
bodyText:
GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - The tension is subdued at the Plettenberg Bay Magistrate’s Court as those gathered wait to be called into the courtroom for Bevan van Druten’s (53) fourth appearance. Today moves at a slower, more subdued pace.

Many of the people to whom George Herald spoke say they are unsure what to expect from today’s proceedings.


> For Nicky van Heerden’s (54) close friends and family, time feels suspended.


Having had little opportunity to process the shock of her death, they are hoping the bail hearing will bring some measure of clarity and perhaps the first real opportunity to begin the grieving process.

Previous articles:

- 4th court appearance for van Druten as bail hearing ties up
- Trail of alleged abuse and intimidation
- Family seeks justice for Nicky van Heerden
- Plettenberg Bay murder case: Bail hearing postponed again for Garden Route artist accused of killing partner
- Murder accused Bevan van Druten bail hearing delayed due to lack of legal representation
- Spiritual leader denies involvement in murder after allegations on social media
- Nicky van Heerden murder: Suspect appears in court
- Sedgefield man to appear in court for former Plettenberg Bay detective’s murder

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
